metadata.name: Accept Underwriting Decision and Pay for Policy

description: An applicant for life insurance has been approved at a higher rate than quoted (rated) and decides to accept the offer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the final underwriting offer for the applicant.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the approved, rated offer.

nodes.task_description: Collect the applicant's acceptance of the rated policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the applicant agrees to the new premium.

nodes.task_description: Take the initial premium payment and issue the policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the first payment and places the policy in force.
